suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add per-crate test commands to services.yaml for more efficient crate-specific testing. Current commands (test, typecheck, lint) run against entire workspace. Workers may need 'cargo test -p <crate>', 'cargo clippy -p <crate>' variants for faster iteration during development.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature benchmark-suite used 'cargo test -p swell-benchmark', 'cargo clippy -p swell-benchmark' commands which are not in services.yaml.
